name: docx_field
description: Insert TOC or page-number field codes, or flag all fields for update. Only the field codes are written — computed values (page numbers, TOC entries) materialize when Word or LibreOffice renders, so never report them as known.

after.description: Paragraph anchor like 'P12#e7f8'. Insert the field after this paragraph (op 'insert_toc').

author.description: Revision author when track_changes is true. Defaults from environment.
